Meta.Purpose: Backend infrastructure for POTOP providing data persistence and social features.

CoreFeatures.Feature: User registration and secure login (likely Firebase Auth or JWT).
Global and regional ranking systems with real-time updates.
JSON-based game state persistence for cross-device play.
Tracking player progression, wave statistics, and balance data.

PlannedModules.Module: Calculates rankings and serves high-score data.
Validates and stores player progress blobs.

StrictConventions.Rule: Maintain strictly decoupled logic from the client.
Ensure high availability and low latency for ranking updates.
Log all critical failures and security-sensitive events.
